subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art sanctified, holy, peerless and exalted! Worthy art Thou of all praise, for Thou hast raised up many a lowly soul to be sovereign of both worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پاک و مقدسا و بيچون و منزها پرستش ترا سزا که بسا بی سر و پائی را سرور دو جهان نمودی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for assistance; intercession
